summary: A 2.5-minute local TV news segment (WGEM) about trade-school enrollment growth, with the station watermark, on-screen news lower-thirds and captions, reporter narration, B-roll of welding and piping-training equipment, and sit-down interviews with school administrators and students. There is no added music or styling.
notable_text: WGEM; THIS YEAR WE HAVE 198; THERE ARE FOUR MAIN TRADE; Piping Training System LabVolt Series
